summary: Re-tested Moon Beauty Space after the premium nail-studio redesign. Backend (FastAPI + MongoDB) and frontend (React) both pass end-to-end. All 7 backend pytest cases pass and every requested redesign flow works: navbar PL labels + CTA, hero (PL title, rating chip 4.9/632+, both CTAs scrolling), services (4 categories, full-offer Booksy link), gallery (all 6 tabs switch and load images), reviews marquee (4.9 / 632+), booking (POST /api/bookings → success), call + Booksy buttons, location (Długa 47/1 + 4 amenities + maps/tel links), Instagram grid + CTA, language PL↔EN↔UA with localStorage persistence, and theme toggle with persistence.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` is defined AFTER the route module body (lines 116-120) but used inside POST /api/bookings exception handler. It works at request-time only because by then the module finished loading; reorganize to put logging.basicConfig + logger = logging.getLogger(__name__) right after imports.
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to FastAPI lifespan context manager.
POST /api/bookings returns 200; REST convention would suggest 201 Created (not required by spec, minor).
No rate limiting / honeypot / CAPTCHA on POST /api/bookings — a public unauthenticated endpoint writing to MongoDB is open to spam/abuse.
Booking form does not validate phone format client-side; backend only enforces 4-40 chars. Stricter E.164 regex recommended.

SITE.booksyUrl in /app/frontend/src/constants/site.js is the generic 'https://booksy.com/' homepage and SITE.instagramUrl is 'https://www.instagram.com/'. Replace with the salon's real Booksy and Instagram URLs before launch (the problem statement says this is expected for now, but flag it).
Gallery component uses framer-motion AnimatePresence with mode='wait' + ~500ms transition; tabs become testable only after ~700-1000ms. Not a bug, just a flake-risk for fast automation.
/app/frontend/src/i18n/translations.js is single-file (369+ lines). If more locales are added, split per-locale to improve maintainability.

Hero rating chip in DOM renders rating + reviews without a separator (`4.9632+ opinii`) — visually fine because they sit in separate styled spans, but consider adding a space or middot for screen-reader / text-content clarity.
test_credentials: n/a — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed bookings via public POST /api/bookings during testing (TEST_Playwright Redesign + the earlier TEST_Anna Kowalska / TEST_Order1 / TEST_Order2 / TEST_X from iteration_1). Live in the 'bookings' collection and safe to delete.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend exposes /api/, /api/status (GET/POST), /api/bookings (GET/POST). Booking model: name/phone/service required; preferred_date/message/language optional; server adds id (uuid), created_at, status='new'. _id is excluded from list queries. Frontend: language stored in localStorage key 'mbs_lang', theme key 'mbs_theme'. Gallery uses framer-motion AnimatePresence mode='wait' — when verifying gallery-item-{tab}-* in Playwright, wait at least 1500-2000ms after clicking a tab. Service select has a disabled placeholder option (value=''); use the first enabled option. Booksy/Instagram links are intentionally placeholders.
rca of the issue: No issues found. Initial test run reported gallery 'extensions' tab as items=0 — this was a test timing artifact (700ms wait < AnimatePresence mode='wait' 500ms exit + mount). With a 2000ms wait the tab renders all 3 images correctly. No app-side fix required.
